2026-03-03PMOCanadian Food Inspection Agency ActAppointment of the President of the Canadian Food Inspection AgencyAppointment of Harpreet Singh Kochhar of Ottawa, Ontario, to be President of the Canadian Food Inspection Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the President of the Canadian Food Inspection Agency
precis: Appointment of Harpreet Singh Kochhar of Ottawa, Ontario, to be President of the Canadian Food Inspection Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, effective March 23, 2026.
